query:
-- Atualizar inventory: batch e expiryDate do produto 207 (productId 990001)
UPDATE inventory i
JOIN (
  SELECT productId, tenantId, batch, expiryDate
  FROM blindConferenceItems
  WHERE productId = 990001 AND batch != ''
  ORDER BY id DESC
  LIMIT 1
) bci ON bci.productId = i.productId AND bci.tenantId = i.tenantId
SET i.batch = bci.batch, i.expiryDate = bci.expiryDate
WHERE i.productId = 990001 AND (i.batch = '' OR i.batch IS NULL);

-- Atualizar inventoryMovements: batch do produto 207
UPDATE inventoryMovements im
JOIN (
  SELECT productId, tenantId, batch
  FROM blindConferenceItems
  WHERE productId = 990001 AND batch != ''
  ORDER BY id DESC
  LIMIT 1
) bci ON bci.productId = im.productId
SET im.batch = bci.batch
WHERE im.productId = 990001 AND (im.batch = '' OR im.batch IS NULL);
